Title: My Remote version 25.9.5.9483 updated on machine BUS-CENTER-PC,DESKTOP-I7G1MM7,DESKTOP-N6E84SS,LENOVO-PC
Notes:
Review the my remote portal, and found  the machine BUS-CENTER-PC,DESKTOP-I7G1MM7,DESKTOP-N6E84SS,LENOVO-PC
running with old version of My Remote. Tried to reinstall the agent from my remote portal, but not succeeded. Tried to restart the service and reinstall again, but unable to update it. So connected to the machine from manage engine  .
Uninstalled the old version and reinstalled the latest version 25.9.5.9483. After that refresh the machine from the portal. It was updated to latest
version of My Remote. Hence closing this ticket.

Title: Manage engine Update on Megan, Melsdesktop to Version 11.4.2528.28.W
Notes: Review the My RMM portal, and found the machine Megan, Melsdesktop running with old version of Manage-Engine. So connected to the machine and then uninstalled the OLD version and downloaded and installed the latest version (11.4.2528.28.W) of the manage-engine agent. Verified from the portal, device is running with updated agent version.

Title: Weekly Firewall Backup – AAVA
Notes:
Ticket Summary

Performed the weekly firewall backup for AAVA. Logged in to the firewall, downloaded the latest configuration backup file, and uploaded the backup to the Teams channel for recordkeeping and reference. Verified that the backup completed successfully.

Title: DESKTOP-I7G1MM7 : Manually patch update as APD failed.
Notes: I accessed the machine and downloaded the package (approximately 1 GB), then successfully applied the patch. Google Chrome was also updated. Afterward, I rescanned the machine via MyRMM, and the patch status has been updated in the system records.

Notes:
I worked on the Missing patches and logged into the ManageEngine portal to review the approved patches for the machines. Title: Update failed patches on the DESKTOP-N6E84SS & Megan Computers
Notes:
As part of scheduled patching and security maintenance, accessed the system to review pending updates. Successfully installed the latest application, driver, and Microsoft 365 updates to ensure system stability and security.

Updates applied:

  • Google Chrome (x64) updated to versions 143.0.7499.192 / 143.0.7499.193

  • Intel Tiger Lake-LP GT2 UHD Graphics G4 driver updated to v32.0.101.7077

  • Microsoft 365 Apps for Enterprise – Current Channel (x64), Version 2512 (Build 19530.20138)

Post-installation verification was completed, and the system is now compliant with the latest update requirements.
